string.name: support_description
string.value: Your support is our motivation to keep improving. If you like this app, please consider rewarding the developer.

string.name: support_milk_tea_title
string.value: Buy me a milk tea for smooth coding ~ 🥤

string.name: support_milk_tea_thanks
string.value: Wow! Milk tea received 🥤✨ Thank you for your sweet support! This cup of milk tea will make my code smoother!

string.name: support_lunch_title
string.value: Sponsor a lunch and fuel my day with energy!🍜

string.name: support_lunch_thanks
string.value: Lunch voucher unlocked successfully! 🍜 Thank you for your generous treat! This meal gives me full energy to code with full power in the afternoon!

string.name: support_partner_title
string.value: Become a booster and let’s journey together! 🚀(Most Popular)

string.name: support_partner_thanks
string.value: Ding! You've become a [Super Support Partner]! 🚀 Thank you for your strong support! This is not just encouragement, but also the driving force for us to move forward together. The upcoming new features will have your contribution!

string.name: support_pm_title
string.value: Take the Product Manager’s seat and call the shots! 👑

string.name: support_pm_thanks
string.value: Warmly welcome [Super Product Manager] to make a brilliant appearance! 👑 Thank you for your powerful support! You have gained our ultimate respect! Your support will directly affect the development priority of the product, so stay tuned!

string.name: support_dialog_message
string.value: If you also like this software, please buy the author a cup of milk tea!

string.name: application_hide_support_tips
string.value: It can only be hidden after donation or use for a period of time
